mission.title: kmesh: The number tag of config_type fields in Filter proto can not exceeds 3.
mission.description: The number tag of config_type fields in Filter proto can not exceeds 3.. Requested by 0+ users.

steps.title: Check current kmesh deployment
steps.description:
Verify your kmesh version and configuration:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kmesh -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kmesh
helm list -n kmesh 2>/dev/null || echo "Not installed via Helm"
```
This feature requires a working kmesh installation.

steps.title: Review kmesh configuration
steps.description:
Inspect the relevant kmesh configuration:
```bash
kubectl get all -n kmesh -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kmesh
kubectl get configmap -n kmesh -l app.kubernetes.io/part-of=kmesh
```
**Please provide an in-depth description of the question you have**:
Hi, I was trying to add a local_rate_limit field inside the Filter message.

steps.title: Apply the fix for The number tag of config_type fields in Filter proto can
Verify the feature works
steps.description:
Test that the new capability is working as expected:
```bash
kubectl get pods -n kmesh -l app.kubernetes.io/name=kmesh
kubectl get events -n kmesh --sort-by='.lastTimestamp' | tail -10
```
Confirm the feature described in "The number tag of config_type fields in Filter proto can" is functioning correctly.

resolution.summary:
The cgo using gcc to compile *.h files, where the libkmesh_api_v2_c.so using clang which may have conflicts.

```
root:/app# docker run -it ghcr.io/kmesh-net/kmesh-build:latest sh
sh-5.2# go env
...
CC='gcc'
CXX='g++'
```
